mk8_flip_key.notes: No locksmith service function has been verified from a public primary source.

functions.name: Passive key emergency start
functions.procedure_summary: Place the passive key in the backup position with the buttons facing upward and use the push-button ignition.

mk8_passive_key.notes: This is an owner emergency-start function, not a key-programming procedure.
